properties.name: openai.api.key
properties.description: API key for OpenAI or OpenAI-compatible providers (e.g., DeepSeek in OpenAI mode).

properties.name: openai.model.name
properties.description: Model name used by the OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, deepseek-chat).

properties.name: openai.base.url
properties.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible API (https://api.openai.com/v1 or provider-specific).

properties.name: openai.temperature
properties.description: Sampling temperature used by the chat model.

properties.name: openai.max.tokens
properties.description: Maximum number of output tokens for chat completions.
